# Add feed URLs or scraper outputs here.
#
# Pipeline: On each build, process_pending_feeds.py reads this file,
# inserts rows into the Supabase `feeds` table, then resets this file
# to the template below. export_feeds_txt.py then regenerates feeds.txt
# from the DB. Do not edit feeds.txt manually.
#
# The "# Source Name" comment becomes the display name in the calendar.
#
# --- ICS feed URLs ---
# Just add the name and URL. The build handles everything else.
#
#   # Source Name
#   https://example.com/events/?ical=1
#
# --- Scrapers ---
# Add the name, cmd, and output path here. But scrapers ALSO need a
# line added to .github/workflows/generate-calendar.yml (in the city's
# scrape step). This file only handles the DB insert; the workflow
# entry is what actually runs the scraper.
#
#   # Source Name
#   # cmd: python scrapers/example.py --name "Source Name"
#   cities/toronto/example.ics
#
# Test before adding:
#   python scripts/add_feed.py URL toronto "Source Name" --test
#   python scripts/add_scraper.py example toronto "Source Name" --test
#
# See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.

# Being and Becoming
# cmd: python scrapers/eventbrite.py --url "https://www.eventbrite.ca/o/being-and-becoming-73656188253" --name "Being and Becoming"
cities/toronto/eventbrite_being_and_becoming.ics

# Brains and Barstools
# cmd: python scrapers/eventbrite.py --url "https://www.eventbrite.ca/o/brains-and-barstools-114602262361" --name "Brains and Barstools"
cities/toronto/eventbrite_brains_and_barstools.ics

# Radical Aliveness Toronto
# cmd: python scrapers/eventbrite.py --url "https://www.eventbrite.ca/o/radical-aliveness-toronto-64308358303" --name "Radical Aliveness Toronto"
cities/toronto/eventbrite_radical_aliveness.ics

# Head Out Toronto
# cmd: python scrapers/eventbrite.py --url "https://www.eventbrite.ca/o/head-out-toronto-86621424023" --name "Head Out Toronto"
cities/toronto/eventbrite_head_out_toronto.ics

# All About Intimacy
# cmd: python scrapers/eventbrite.py --url "https://www.eventbrite.ca/o/all-about-intimacy-86037364023" --name "All About Intimacy"
cities/toronto/eventbrite_all_about_intimacy.ics

# The AI Collective
# cmd: python scrapers/luma_collection.py --url "https://luma.com/genai-collective" --name "The AI Collective" --timezone "America/Toronto"
cities/toronto/luma_genai_collective.ics

# Devtools Toronto
# cmd: python scrapers/luma_collection.py --url "https://luma.com/devtoolsTO" --name "Devtools Toronto" --timezone "America/Toronto"
cities/toronto/luma_devtools_toronto.ics

# Intuit Open Source Meetup
# cmd: python scrapers/luma_collection.py --url "https://luma.com/intuit-open-source-meetup" --name "Intuit Open Source Meetup" --timezone "America/Toronto"
cities/toronto/luma_intuit_open_source.ics
